data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature Project Merlin (MRLN) on September 16
data.description: Key TakeawaysProject Merlin (MRLN) will launch on Binance Alpha on September 16, 2025.Eligible users can claim airdrops with Alpha Points once trading goes live.Further listing details, including trading pairs and schedules, will be announced soon.Project Merlin (MRLN) Launches on Binance AlphaBinance Alpha confirmed it will feature  Project Merlin (MRLN) on September 16, expanding its roster of early-stage blockchain projects.Users eligible under the Binance Alpha Points program will be able to claim their airdrop allocations on the Alpha Events page once MRLN trading officially opens.

data.title: DefiLlama founder: Under pressure for questioning Figure data, most of its loan processes can hardly find on-chain payment transactions
data.description: 0xngmi, the anonymous founder of the on-chain data analysis website DefiLlama, posted on the X platform that Figure wanted him to avoid due diligence on the company and attempted to pressure him through public and private defamation. 0xngmi pointed out that the value of DefiLlama lies in user trust in providing good data, and that providing high-quality data that meets user expectations and helps them make informed decisions is crucial. Figure claims to have $12 billion in on-chain RWAs, but DefiLlama's investigation revealed the following: 1. Figure only holds $5 million worth of BTC and $4 million worth of ETH on exchanges (of which Bitcoin's 24-hour trading volume is only $2,000); 2. Figure's own stablecoin, YLDS, has a supply of only 20 million, which theoretically should be the basis for all RWA transactions; 3. Most transactions transferring RWA assets appear to be conducted by accounts other than those holding these assets; and 4. Figure's lending process is overwhelmingly completed using fiat currency, with virtually no on-chain payments. 0xngmi added that DefiLlama is unsure how Figure's $12 billion in assets are being traded with so few on-chain assets available for trading. Since most holders don't appear to be transferring these assets using their own keys, it's questionable whether they are simply mirroring their internal databases on-chain.

data.title: Bitcoin Treasury Firm DDC Partners with Wintermute to Access OTC Liquidity in Spot and Derivatives
data.description: DDC Enterprise Limited, a Bitcoin company listed on the New York Stock Exchange, has announced a partnership with Wintermute. The partnership will reportedly enable DDC to access Wintermute’s over-the-counter liquidity in both spot and derivatives, thereby accelerating its Bitcoin accumulation strategy and improving its execution efficiency in the global digital asset market.

data.title: Tether Plans to Launch USAT by Year-End, Announces New U.S. Headquarters
data.description: According to PANews, cryptocurrency journalist Eleanor Terrett reported on the X platform that Tether's CEO, Paolo Ardoino, revealed plans to launch USAT by the end of the year. Additionally, the newly appointed CEO, Bo Hines, announced that Tether's new U.S. headquarters will be located in Charlotte, North Carolina.
